title: PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote)
description: Role: PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote) Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout: $30 - $110/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a PHP Back End Developer to work on a contract basis implementing and maintaining core backend services for high-traffic web applications. The role involves developing and optimizing server-side logic to ensure scalability and performance of applications handling significant user interaction. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and maintain PHP-based backend services and APIs to support web application functionality. • Optimize existing codebase for performance, security, and scalability. • Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented PHP code following industry best practices. • Debug and troubleshoot issues across the application stack, including database queries and API endpoints. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Minimum 3 years of experience in PHP development with strong proficiency in PHP 7.x or 8.x. • Experience with PHP frameworks such as Laravel, Symfony, or CodeIgniter. • Proficiency in MySQL or PostgreSQL database design and optimization. • Experience with RESTful API development and integration. • Familiarity with version control systems, preferably Git. • Knowledge of server environments (Linux/Unix) and deployment workflows. • Experience with caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached) and background job processing. • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently in a remote setting. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of scalable backend systems powering a widely used platform. The position requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Software Engineer - Backend (Remote)
description: Role : Backend Engineer Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $20 - $70/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Backend Engineer to work on a contract basis. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement efficient APIs and data pipelines. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and deploy robust backend services using modern frameworks and tools. • Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability for global users. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices. • Debug and resolve issues in production environments with a focus on uptime. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in backend programming languages such as Python, Java, or Go. • Experience with RESTful and GraphQL API development and integration. • Strong understanding of databases (SQL and NoSQL) and query optimization. • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes). • Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and version control systems like Git. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development | Technology, Information and Internet | IT Services and IT Consulting | Information Services industry, contributing to the development of high-impact backend systems. The contract includes flexibility to work across time zones and deliver solutions that scale globally. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Backend Developer - C#/.NET (Remote)

The role involves developing and maintaining backend services using C# and .NET technologies. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable and efficient solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop, test, and deploy backend services and APIs using C# and .NET. • Design and implement robust, scalable architecture solutions. • Collaborate with frontend developers and other stakeholders to integrate systems. • Optimize application performance and resolve technical issues. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in C# and .NET framework development. • Experience with backend API development and integration. • Knowledge of database design and SQL Server or similar databases. • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS is preferred. • Strong problem-solving and debugging skills. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the development of cutting-edge backend solutions. The position is fully remote, allowing for flexible work arrangements. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.
